overall.description: A cinematic static shot of a grand gothic dining hall with soaring vaulted ceilings, tall arched windows, and an enormous skeletal structure suspended from the rafters. Students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables, and the scene is rendered in high-quality game engine graphics reminiscent of Hogwarts Legacy.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with suspended skeleton exhibit

events.description: student in dark robes and hat enters from left side and walks toward the tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the great hall interior and students at tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark wizard robes and pointed hat walking into the hall from the left entrance

entered.detail: tall stained glass windows with pointed arches allowing bright daylight to stream in
enormous skeletal structure of a whale or sea creature suspended from the vaulted ceiling with chains
long wooden banquet tables with attached benches arranged in rows
grey stone walls with high vaulted architecture and archways
medieval-style iron chandeliers hanging from chains above the tables

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic great hall with soaring stone architecture and massive arched windows. An enormous skeleton hangs from the ceiling above wooden dining tables where students in dark robes sit. The lighting is natural and diffused through the tall windows. Near the end of the clip, a student enters from the left and walks into the hall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall that remains poised in stillness before a sudden movement introduces life into the space. It begins with a wide perspective of soaring stone architecture and massive arched windows, where natural, diffused light illuminates the vast interior. The camera captures the imposing presence of an enormous skeleton suspended from the ceiling, looming over long wooden tables occupied by students in dark robes. The scene then shifts in dynamic as a lone student enters from the left, walking steadily into the hall and breaking the initial silence of the environment.
